_notes: Parametric capture layout: one shared input wav, one output wav per knob setting.
Parameter metadata (names, ranges, types, enum names) lives in the model config under
net.config.params and is injected here at train time; this file only lists per-capture
named raw values. Continuous values are user-facing (e.g. a knob from 0-10); switch
train = the settings the model learns (seen audio + seen params).
validation = HELD-OUT settings the model never
trains on, scored on the held-out audio tail, so val ESR measures interpolation
